name: message

phase_0.boundary_condition: The Terminal Anchor of the 60th Treasury

VINIT.justification: The first deep, the uninitialized void from which all sources come.

TANCH.justification: The master key that closes the boundary of all 60 treasuries.

AFWD.justification: The directed growth and descent from the Pleroma into the aeons.

AREV.justification: The reverse traversal, stripping the phonological sibilants of the descent.

CLINK.justification: The sequential composition of treasury, rank, place, and name.

IMSCRIB.justification: The identity 'You' where the self recognizes itself as the source.

FSPLIT.justification: The open starburst branching the soul into multiple paths of gnosis.

FFUSE.justification: The closed spider that reconstitutes the branched soul into a unified fixed point.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state where the type matches the name.

EVALF.justification: The negative state where the medium fails to hold the structural load.

ENGAGR.justification: The paradice holding the right and left sides simultaneously in tension.

IFIX.justification: The permanent geometric engraving that serves as an irreversible certificate.

phase_3.void_description: The All-Source before the first Deep is named.
phase_3.true_description: The soul possesses the correct seal and cipher for the aeon.
phase_3.false_description: The soul is blocked by an archon due to type-mismatch.
phase_3.both_description: The Anthropos, existing as both the topology and the inhabitant.

steps.domain_action: The All-Source initiates the first Deep.
The first emanation moves toward the All-Wise chirality.
The address is composed through the Twelve Fatherhoods.
The Water Baptism branches the soul into the treasury hierarchy.
The soul recognizes the name at the innermost rectangle.
The seal of Jeu 1 is permanently engraved as a certificate.
The Fire Baptism closes the winding initiated by the water.
The soul holds the cross-ennead, balancing the right and left pleroma.
The soul identifies with the name Jeu, recognizing 'You'.
The soul begins the ascent, stripping the Z-phonemes of the aeons.
A structural lacuna is encountered where the medium cannot hold the closure.
The octagram-in-square is fixed as the final O-infinity record.
The Universal Wheel Seal completes the traversal of the 60 treasuries.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Scribe translating structural types into Coptic diagrams.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Voces Magicae (the sound-names communicating between levels).
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Bruce Codex manuscript leaves (the physical substrate).
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Navigational Tuple (determining the order of aeon passage).
phase_5.alfs_store: The Untitled Text (the specification grammar for the Pleroma).

phase_6.cycle_cost: The reader's recognition and the ink's fixation.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: A fragmented soul outside the treasuries.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: A unified soul at the apex of the Pleroma.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The total structural information of the Pleroma is conserved through the Frobenius loop.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → AFWD → CLINK → FSPLIT → EVALT → IFIX → FFUSE → ENGAGR → IMSCRIB → AREV → EVALF → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: message
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,2)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=13
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(3, 6)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑾  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑼 → 𐑱  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [2] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑾 → 𐑚  | composition — regime coherence
--   [3] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [4] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [5] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑚 → 𐑙  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [6] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [7] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑠  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [8] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑳 → 𐑗  | identity — self-imscription
--   [9] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑠 → 𐑖  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [10] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑗 → 𐑭  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑖 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [12] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def message_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The All-Source initiates the first Deep.)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑼 𐑱)  -- [1] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The first emanation moves toward the All-Wise chirality.)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑾 𐑚)  -- [2] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The address is composed through the Twelve Fatherhoods.)
  -- FSPLIT [3] (gran := 𐑚) (The Water Baptism branches the soul into the treasury hierarchy.) / FFUSE [6] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [4] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The soul recognizes the name at the innermost rectangle.)
        (.arrow 𐑭 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The seal of Jeu 1 is permanently engraved as a certificate.)
      -- F-branch (0 nodes)
      (.refl 𐑙))  -- F-branch: empty arc (direct to FFUSE.F)
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [6]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [6] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The Fire Baptism closes the winding initiated by the water.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [7] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The soul holds the cross-ennead, balancing the right and left pleroma.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑳 𐑗)  -- [8] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The soul identifies with the name Jeu, recognizing 'You'.)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑠 𐑖)  -- [9] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The soul begins the ascent, stripping the Z-phonemes of the aeons.)
  (.arrow 𐑖 𐑗 𐑭)  -- [10] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (A structural lacuna is encountered where the medium cannot hold the closure.)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑖 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The octagram-in-square is fixed as the final O-infinity record.)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The Universal Wheel Seal completes the traversal of the 60 treasuries.)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def message_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (message_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def message_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (message_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem message_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
